title: 3 Tier Stackable Craft Storage Box – 30 Adjustable Compartments, Clear Plastic Organiser with Carry Handle – Ideal for Beads, DIY, Tools & Art Supplies
features: Expandable 30 Adjustable Compartments – Fully customize your storage with removable dividers across 3 tiers to suit beads, screws, craft pots, and tubes.
Stack, Detach & Carry – Stack neatly or separate tiers; each box has a sturdy handle so you can take your craft materials anywhere.
Crystal-Clear Visibility – The transparent plastic allows instant view of contents—no need to open every lid for identification.
sIZE - L 25cm x W 17cm x H 18cm (6cm).
2-YEAR WARRANTY - The Pukkr 3 Tier Storage Boxes come with a 2-year manufacturer's warranty. › See more product details
description: Product Description 3 Tier Storage Boxes | Pukkr Having hobbies that require organisation, such as arts & crafts, can be tricky to get right and difficult to keep all of your small items together like your pots of glitter and threads. The Pukkr 3 Tier Storage Boxes provide you and your favourite hobby with a great new practical way of organising and storing small items without getting them mixed up or lost. Organise your brushes, small paint bottles, pins, and colouring tools into different adjustable compartments. With each storage box coming with a convenient carrying handle and secured with a snap-lock latch, there is no better way to keep your smaller accessories neat and safe. ✔️ VERSATILE ORGANISATION Need to organise your arts & crafts supplies? The Pukkr 3 Tier Storage Boxes are the perfect storage units for any small items such as crayons, pots of glitter and pins thanks to the 30 adjustable compartment sliders. ✔️ STACK & DETACH With the divided compartments within each storage box, you can keep all of your items tidy, but stay even more organised by stacking the boxes on top of each other. Got an empty box? Remove the top storage box! ✔️ CONVENIENT The clear plastic material of these boxes are great for seeing what is inside without having to open up each container. If you like to take your craft supplies with you wherever you go, the carrying handle on each box is sure to make this possible. ✔️ SIZE 25cm (L) x 17cm (W) x 18cm (H) (6cm). Specifications Size: 25cm (L) x 17cm (W) x 18cm (H) (6cm). MateriaI: Plastic In the Box: 1 x 3 Tier Storage Box Images: 2020 Maison & White
